snippets.title: Create a document
snippets.description: Open a transaction, create a draft post, then publish it.
snippets.expectedOutput: MutateEnvelope { transactionId, results: [{ id, operation: 'create', document }] } followed by MutateResult { operation: 'publish' }

snippets.title: Listen for updates
snippets.description: Async-iterate the listen() SSE stream; unsubscribe after 30s.
snippets.expectedOutput: Log line per mutation event: [mutation] <type>:<id> <op> rev=<rev>

snippets.title: Optimistic mutation with conflict handling
snippets.description: useOptimisticDocument wrapping a Server Action; shows a conflict banner when a BarkparkConflictError is returned.
snippets.expectedOutput: Immediate UI update → committed state replaces optimistic on success → conflict populated on BarkparkConflictError.

snippets.title: Publish / unpublish
snippets.description: defineActions round-trip publishing and unpublishing a single post id.

snippets.title: Server Component fetch
snippets.description: App Router RSC reading a document type via barkparkFetch with a type-scoped tag.
snippets.expectedOutput: RSC renders <ul> of posts; server fetch attaches next.tags = ['bp:ds:production:_all', 'bp:ds:production:type:post'].

snippets.title: Server Action mutation
snippets.description: 'use server' module exporting createPostAction; creates + patches a post and fans out revalidate tags.
snippets.expectedOutput: Post created then patched; revalidateTag called for doc:<id> and type:post.

snippets.title: Revalidate from webhook
snippets.description: Webhook route that verifies HMAC (with rotation window), dedupes retries, and fires revalidateBarkpark.
